contact.metaDescription: Reach out to The Veil — questions, data requests, legal notices.
contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Send a message and we'll get back to you. For data-protection requests (export, deletion, correction), pick the matching category so it routes to the right inbox.

placeholders.name: Your name
placeholders.message: Tell us what's on your mind.

contact.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. We'll reply to the email you provided.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again in a moment.

errors.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer.
errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.
errors.messageTooLong: Message must be 5000 characters or fewer.
